description: Style NoteA unique blend of comfort and style this pair of capris from nike are made keeping in mind your love for sport and exercise. Its blended composition and Dri-Fit quality lets you carry on for hours with total ease. Pair it with a short sleeved T-shirt and sneakers for a rigorous workout.Product DetailsGrey training capris, double layered green yoke at front and back, printed  Nike swoosh on front yoke,  pocket on inner front yoke, gusset at crotch, front panel extends to back at side seam, flat lock stitch at all seams, printed branding on back inner yoke for abrasion free comfort Materials and CareBody -88% recycled polyester 12% spandex Gusset-100% polyesterMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not ironSize and FitSlim fitThe model(height 5'8 and waist 28) is wearing a size M
